# Aldridge & Charles Marine

> A private marine office providing the full range of services a great yacht requires: management, brokerage, refit, charter, crew, detailing, engineering counsel, and berthing logistics. Growing by introduction and reputation, harbour by harbour.

Aldridge & Charles Marine (ACMarine) is a privately held firm offering eight practices for owners of significant vessels. Trust, reliability, restraint, and time at sea are the four values everything is judged against. The roster is small; the standard is global.

## Practices

- [Yacht Management](https://acmarine.com/#services): Flag, finance, compliance, payroll, insurance, and crew.
- [Brokerage & Acquisition](https://acmarine.com/#services): Off-market vessels, sea trials, surveys, and considered purchase processes.
- [Refit & Project Oversight](https://acmarine.com/#services): Owner's representative shipyard-side from cosmetic refinishment to engineering re-power.
- [Crew Placement](https://acmarine.com/#services): Vetted captains, engineers, chefs, stewards and deckhands.
- [Detailing & Daily Stewardship](https://acmarine.com/#services): Varnish, paint, leather, teak, polish and deep wash by hand.
- [Charter Programmes](https://acmarine.com/#services): Itineraries shaped to the principal; hospitality directed in person.
- [Engineering & Technical Counsel](https://acmarine.com/#services): Re-power studies, propulsion modelling, electronics, classification.
- [Berths, Transits & Concierge](https://acmarine.com/#services): Moorings, customs, transits, provisioning.

## Fleet

- [The Fleet](https://acmarine.com/fleet): vessels currently presented for sale, charter, and management.

## Approach

- One principal, one director, one telephone number.
- Paid by retainer. No referral fees. No kickbacks.
- Annual books reviewed by independent maritime counsel.
- Offices in Monaco, Antibes, Newport, and Seattle. Operations from the Mediterranean to the Indian Ocean.

## Contact

- Email: office@acmarine.com
- Site: https://acmarine.com/
- Enquiries: https://acmarine.com/#contact
